name: WGV: Dreamcatcher
short_description: A fanmade visual novel game by Virtual 48Group fans for Virtual 48Group fans, which tells multiple-fanmade-stories about a group of sophisticated 48 Vtuber Idol from Jakarta, Indonesia. You play as a 1st year student where you will interact with friends through multi-ended choice-based storyline.
detailed_description:
This is a free unofficial fan-game.

In this game, you play as a 1st year student in Jeketi University. There, you interact with friends through multi-ended choice-based storyline. This is a free fan-made project, made out of love for 48G's Virtual member for 48G's Virtual fans.

Currently, this game only available in Bahasa Indonesia.

We might do localization and translations in the future update.

Disclaimer: This project is not affiliated in any way with JKT48 Operational Team or AKA Virtual. Any references to these entities are for contextual purposes only, and this project is independent and unaffiliated with them.
